mixture_semantics.calibration_note: Calibrated timing mode samples timing bins uniformly by family. Small/moderate/stress physical-effect levels are reach-relative; calibrated training consumes the checked-in unit-sensitivity table to set plant-side amplitudes per family, timing bin, and reach length.
mixture_semantics.experimental_factor_note: Perturbation uncertainty level is an experimental factor distinct from physical perturbation amplitude. Broader randomized families, signs, components, timings, or mixtures can induce robustness rather than only testing ordinary feedback control.

command_input.emission: add a duration-limited pulse in one uniform random 2D command direction over a random start time; base amount is the vector norm

initial_position.emission: offset one random mechanics.vector position component among x/y at t=0 by sign * amplitude_level * base_amplitude

initial_velocity.emission: offset one random mechanics.vector velocity component among x/y at t=0 by sign * amplitude_level * base_amplitude

process_epsilon.emission: add a duration-limited pulse to one random epsilon component over a random start time

sensory_feedback.emission: add an offset pulse on one random 4D sensory-feedback component; current training uses full-trial duration

membership.mild_combined: initial_position and command_input are both active, scaled by combined_amplitude_scale; the other families are inactive
membership.nominal: no explicit perturbation beyond ordinary stochastic runtime
membership.single_family: one family sampled uniformly from single_family_bins, then family-specific component/sign/timing/level randomization is applied

inactive_legacy_families.reason: delayed_observation offsets duplicate sensory_feedback offsets in the current sensory stage and are excluded from active training bins

mixture_semantics.validation_difference: Validation bins are deterministic family-separated probes, not a replay of the full training mixture. They expose separate nominal, single-family, and mild-combined bins for checkpoint selection/reporting.

target_stream.reason: fixed-target C&S GRU does not consume a target-position stream

inactive_legacy_families.reason: delayed_observation offsets duplicate sensory_feedback offsets in the current sensory stage and are excluded from active training bins

budget_contract.reach_length_scaling_note: The 15 cm effective PGD radius is scaled by sampled reach length when target-relative multi-target training is active.

objective.energy: maximize controller loss minus energy_penalty_gamma * epsilon_energy; H-infinity-style stabilizer only, not a formal certificate
objective.plain: maximize controller loss under hard projected epsilon

movement_epoch.cost_tail_semantics: score exactly the canonical 60 movement-age stages, then stop

delayed_reach.multi_target_contract: same structured target-relative target bank as non-delayed rows

efferent.noise_timing: Feedbax efferent Channel immediately before LinearStateSpace.force

components.description: Controller-visible delayed position in target-relative coordinates: target position minus delayed effector position.
components.label: Target-relative delayed position

components.description: Controller-visible delayed velocity as the negative delayed effector velocity in the target-relative feedback basis.
components.label: Negated delayed velocity

components.description: Controller-visible delayed C&S force/filter coordinates appended to the proprioceptive feedback basis.
components.label: Delayed force/filter state

variable.description: The feedback vector consumed by the GRU controller. Components are ordered by descriptor basis identity rather than consumer-local row constants.
variable.label: Controller-visible feedback vector

metadata.source_timing: controller step after feedback delay and before GRU update

feedback.noise_timing: Feedbax sensory Channel after delayed LSS feedback selector

initial_hidden_encoder.initialization_note: Exact zero affine weights and bias preserve the zero-H0 baseline at initialization while remaining trainable through ordinary rollout loss.

plant_process.epsilon_bridge: sampled physical-process/load epsilon Task input bound to C&S LinearStateSpace mechanics.epsilon using the physical block of the released C&S process covariance

projection_notes.additive_motor: Project C&S input-image motor covariance to command-channel additive noise with std sqrt(motor_covariance_scale).
projection_notes.plant_process: Project C&S process/load covariance to independent force noise immediately upstream of mechanics, after the force filter.
projection_notes.sensory: Use the C&S sensory covariance diagonal standard deviation on the Feedbax delayed pos/vel feedback channel.
projection_notes.signal_dependent_motor: Use the C&S Csdn scale as Feedbax pre-force-filter multiplicative command noise.
projection_notes.state_diffusion: No arbitrary full-state diffusion is used in Feedbax GRU rollout.

stochastic_runtime.command_runtime: Feedbax efferent Channel immediately before LinearStateSpace.force; additive and signal-dependent motor noise are both command-channel noise
stochastic_runtime.plant_process_runtime: Task-sampled physical-process/load epsilon bound to LinearStateSpace.epsilon
stochastic_runtime.sensory_runtime: Feedbax sensory Channel after the 4D delayed LSS feedback selector; the delay itself is represented by the C&S 48D LSS state

calibrated_amplitude_policy.amplitude_level_randomization: disabled in calibrated_timing mode; the declared physical_level fixes the effect-size target

command_input_training_direction_policy.amplitude_interpretation: calibrated value is the 2D vector norm
command_input_training_direction_policy.deterministic_bank_rows: validation and diagnostic banks may still enumerate cardinal or target-aligned lateral directions for interpretability

calibrated_amplitude_policy.controller_visible_rule: position components are native reach_length_m * level_fraction offsets; velocity components are native nominal_peak_speed_m_s * level_fraction offsets
calibrated_amplitude_policy.initial_state_rule: position amount = reach_length_m * level_fraction; velocity amount = reach_length_m * level_fraction / initial_velocity_peak_delta_x_per_unit

mixture_semantics.calibration_note: Calibrated timing mode samples timing bins uniformly by family. Small/moderate/stress physical-effect levels are reach-relative; calibrated training consumes the checked-in unit-sensitivity table to set plant-side amplitudes per family, timing bin, and reach length.
mixture_semantics.experimental_factor_note: Perturbation uncertainty level is an experimental factor distinct from physical perturbation amplitude. Broader randomized families, signs, components, timings, or mixtures can induce robustness rather than only testing ordinary feedback control.

command_input.emission: add a duration-limited pulse in one uniform random 2D command direction over a calibrated timing bin; calibrated amount is the vector norm

initial_position.emission: offset one random mechanics.vector position component among x/y at movement_start using a one-step process-epsilon impulse by sign * reach_length * physical_level_fraction

initial_velocity.emission: offset one random mechanics.vector velocity component among x/y at movement_start using a one-step process-epsilon impulse by sign * reach_length * physical_level_fraction / initial_velocity_peak_delta_x_per_unit

process_epsilon.emission: add a duration-limited pulse to one random epsilon component over a calibrated timing bin

sensory_feedback.emission: add an offset pulse on one random 4D sensory-feedback component; calibrated timing mode uses controller-visible 5-step bins

membership.mild_combined: initial_position and command_input are both active, scaled by combined_amplitude_scale; the other families are inactive
membership.nominal: no explicit perturbation beyond ordinary stochastic runtime
membership.single_family: one family sampled uniformly from single_family_bins, then family-specific component/sign/timing/level randomization is applied

movement_onset_state_offsets.implementation: TaskTrialSpec has trial-start inits but no arbitrary state-set event; delayed movement-onset offsets are represented as one-step process epsilon impulses on the matching mechanics.vector position/velocity component at movement_start.
movement_onset_state_offsets.requested_semantics: initial_position and initial_velocity become movement-onset state-offset diagnostics in movement-age mode

timing_basis.undelayed_equivalence: For one-epoch immediate reaches, epoch_bounds[-2] resolves to 0, so movement-age starts match the historical absolute starts.

inactive_legacy_families.reason: delayed_observation offsets duplicate sensory_feedback offsets in the current sensory stage and are excluded from active training bins

mixture_semantics.validation_difference: Validation bins are deterministic family-separated probes, not a replay of the full training mixture. They expose separate nominal, single-family, and mild-combined bins for checkpoint selection/reporting.

target_stream.reason: fixed-target C&S GRU does not consume a target-position stream

projection_notes.sensory: Use the C&S sensory covariance diagonal standard deviation on the Feedbax delayed pos/vel feedback channel.
projection_notes.signal_dependent_motor: Use the C&S Csdn scale as Feedbax pre-force-filter multiplicative command noise.
projection_notes.state_diffusion: No arbitrary full-state diffusion is used in Feedbax GRU rollout.

mixture_semantics.calibration_note: Calibrated timing mode samples timing bins uniformly by family. Small/moderate/stress physical-effect levels are reach-relative; calibrated training consumes the checked-in unit-sensitivity table to set plant-side amplitudes per family, timing bin, and reach length.
mixture_semantics.experimental_factor_note: Perturbation uncertainty level is an experimental factor distinct from physical perturbation amplitude. Broader randomized families, signs, components, timings, or mixtures can induce robustness rather than only testing ordinary feedback control.

command_input.emission: add a duration-limited pulse in one uniform random 2D command direction over a calibrated timing bin; calibrated amount is the vector norm

initial_position.emission: offset one random mechanics.vector position component among x/y at movement_start using a one-step process-epsilon impulse by sign * reach_length * physical_level_fraction

initial_velocity.emission: offset one random mechanics.vector velocity component among x/y at movement_start using a one-step process-epsilon impulse by sign * reach_length * physical_level_fraction / initial_velocity_peak_delta_x_per_unit

process_epsilon.emission: add a duration-limited pulse to one random epsilon component over a calibrated timing bin

sensory_feedback.emission: add an offset pulse on one random 4D sensory-feedback component; calibrated timing mode uses controller-visible 5-step bins

membership.mild_combined: initial_position and command_input are both active, scaled by combined_amplitude_scale; the other families are inactive
membership.nominal: no explicit perturbation beyond ordinary stochastic runtime
membership.single_family: one family sampled uniformly from single_family_bins, then family-specific component/sign/timing/level randomization is applied

movement_onset_state_offsets.implementation: TaskTrialSpec has trial-start inits but no arbitrary state-set event; delayed movement-onset offsets are represented as one-step process epsilon impulses on the matching mechanics.vector position/velocity component at movement_start.

projection_notes.additive_motor: Project C&S input-image motor covariance to command-channel additive noise with std sqrt(motor_covariance_scale).
projection_notes.plant_process: Project C&S process/load covariance to independent force noise immediately upstream of mechanics, after the force filter.
projection_notes.sensory: Use the C&S sensory covariance diagonal standard deviation on the Feedbax delayed pos/vel feedback channel.
projection_notes.signal_dependent_motor: Use the C&S Csdn scale as Feedbax pre-force-filter multiplicative command noise.
projection_notes.state_diffusion: No arbitrary full-state diffusion is used in Feedbax GRU rollout.
